blended.narrative: Red Lodge Mountain is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 6 inches of dry powder expected. Snow levels around 3,988 ft. Looking ahead, 17 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 6" of snow, highs of 22°F. Expect powder.
Friday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 4" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Sunday: 4" of snow, highs of 22°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: 6.8" of new snow over the past week. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 28".
